narration: An event horizon isn't a wall; it's a boundary beyond which nothing escapes.
visual_description: Hook visual: An event horizon isn't a wall; it's a boundary beyond which nothing escapes.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: An event horizon isn't a wall; it's a boundary beyond which nothing escapes.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: An event horizon isn't a wall; it's a boundary beyond which nothing escapes.

narration: Imagine a point in space where escape speed equals light speed. That's it.
visual_description: Context visual: Imagine a point in space where escape speed equals light speed. That's it.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Imagine a point in space where escape speed equals light speed. That's it.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Imagine a point in space where escape speed equals light speed. That's it.

narration: Once you cross this point, no signal can escape. Not even light.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Once you cross this point, no signal can escape. Not even light.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Once you cross this point, no signal can escape. Not even light.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Once you cross this point, no signal can escape. Not even light.

narration: This boundary marks the limits of our observable universe around black holes.
